person.name: Gerard de Furnival
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Sir Gerard Furnival was born circa 1235 at of Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, England.

Sir Gerard Furnival married Isabel, b. c 1237.

He died circa 15 August 1302 at of Great Munden & Caldecote, Hertfordshire, England.

«b»Children:«/b»
1.) Beatrix Furnival, wife of Peter Bosvile, son of Sir John Bosvile and Alice de Durfield

2.) Christiana Furnival, wife of William de Eylesford

3.) Loretta de Furnival, wife of Sir John de Usflete, & of Sir Geoffrey le Scrope of Masham

sourceList.title: Legacy NFS Source: Gerard de Furnival - birth: about 1235; Sheffield, Yorkshire, England
Gerard had 2 daughters and died between 1290 amd 1302.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerard de Furnival於大約1235年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾伯頓 拉梅時，他的父親Gerard de Furnival35歲，母親Christiana Ledet38歲。他於大約1260年與Maud FitzJohn在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1302年8月15日在英國英格蘭賀特福爾格亞特 蒙登享年68歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Furnival
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: locative name from Fourneville (Calvados), Fournival in Saint-Just-en-Chaussée (Oise), or Fournival in Saint-Julien-sur-Sarthe (Orne).

nameMeanings.name: Gerard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

en.lifeSummary: When Gerard de Furnival was born about 1235, in Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Gerard de Furnival, was 35 and his mother, Christiana Ledet, was 38. He married Maud FitzJohn about 1260, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died about 15 August 1302, in Great Munden, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerard de Furnival est né environ 1235, à Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gerard de Furnival, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Christiana Ledet, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Maud FitzJohn environ 1260, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 15 août 1302, à Great Munden, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans.

ko.St Mary Magdalene's Abbey, Shap, Westmor: 영국 웨스트모를랜드 샤프 스트 메리 막그다렌'스 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Gerard de Furnival(이)가 대략 1235년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 버턴 레이팀어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gerard de Furnival(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Christiana Ledet(은)는 38세였다. 그는 대략 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 Maud FitzJohn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1302년 8월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 그리트 먼든에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, Englan: Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gerard de Furnival nasceu aproximadamente 1235, em Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gerard de Furnival, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Christiana Ledet, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud FitzJohn aproximadamente 1260, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 15 de agosto de 1302, em Great Munden, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos.

ru.St Mary Magdalene's Abbey, Shap, Westmor: ст мэри магдеилине'с эбби, шап, вестморланд, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gerard de Furnival родился около 1235 г. в местности буртон латимир, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gerard de Furnival было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Christiana Ledet, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud FitzJohn около 1260 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер около 15 августа 1302 г. в местности грит мунден, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gerard de Furnival nació aproximadamente 1235, en Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Gerard de Furnival, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Christiana Ledet, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Maud FitzJohn aproximadamente 1260, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 15 de agosto de 1302, en Great Munden, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años.
